title: Small grammar fix
body: This sentence is a good example where 'that' is the correct choice for the clause 'facilitates building OCI container images'. A good reference for this fix is http://www.writersdigest.com/online-editor/which-vs-that (amongst others.)

comments.body:
Can one of the admins verify this patch?
I understand the following commands:
- `bot, add author to whitelist`
- `bot, test pull request`
- `bot, test pull request once`
@quaid Thanks a bunch of the patch.  The change LGTM, but you'll need to sign it.  Can you "git commit --amend -s" and repush your patch please?
@TomSweeneyRedHat Can you just steal this fix from @quaid, and get it merged.
Yep, on my Saturday fun project list.
